title: Xtra American Pecan Pudding
description: A nutty, silky pudding that blends sweet pecans, rich dulce de leche, and mellow mantecare for a hearty American dessert.
instructions: Preheat oven to 325°F and line a 6‑inch molcajete with parchment paper.
In a bowl, whisk together milk, cream, dulce de leche, mantecare, maple syrup, vanilla, and pinch of salt until smooth.
Add beaten eggs to the liquid mixture and whisk until fully incorporated.
Fold in toasted pecans, reserving a small handful for topping.
Pour the batter into the prepared molcajete and smooth the surface with a spatula.
Bake in the preheated oven for 35 minutes, or until the edges are set and the center still jiggles slightly.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes before transferring to a serving dish.
Top with the reserved toasted pecans for added crunch and visual appeal.
Serve warm or at room temperature, optionally drizzled with extra dulce de leche.
Enjoy the silky, nutty flavor of this energizing American pudding.
